findings.detail: PoolFactory.setFee() changes fee/tax parameters with NO access control. Any address can call this function.
Interface IPoolFactory defines fee setter function(s): setFee. Find implementations to check access control.

findings.signature: function sweepToken(address token, uint256 amountMinimum, address recipient) public payable override nonReentrant
findings.detail: PeripheryPayments.sweepToken() can withdraw funds without access control and doesn't appear to be user-balance-scoped.
